message:
🌱 Add keda: Metrics API Scaler support different format mission (#1317)

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,77 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "keda-2633-metrics-api-scaler-support-different-format",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "keda: Metrics API Scaler support different format",
+    "description": "Metrics API Scaler support different format. Requested by 9+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current keda deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your keda version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n keda -l app.kubernetes.io/name=keda\nhelm list -n keda 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working keda installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review keda configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant keda configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n keda -l app.kubernetes.io/name=keda\nkubectl get configmap -n keda -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=keda\n```\n### Proposal\n\nExtend metrics API scaler to support Prometheus format, **or new scaler would be preferable?**\n\nI'm thinking something like\n\n```yaml\ntriggers:\n- type: metrics-api\n  metadata:\n    targetValue: \"8\"\n    url:"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Metrics API Scaler support different format",
+        "description": "_Provide a description of what has been changed_\n```yaml\ntriggers:\n- type: metrics-api\n  metadata:\n    targetValue: \"8\"\n    url: \"http://api:3232/api/v1/stats?format=prometheus\"\n    valueLocation: \"go_memstats_mcache_inuse_bytes\"\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n keda -l app.kubernetes.io/name=keda\nkubectl get events -n keda --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"Metrics API Scaler support different format\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "See the fix PR for the community-verified solution: https://github.com/kedacore/keda/pull/5347",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "triggers:\n- type: metrics-api\n  metadata:\n    targetValue: \"8\"\n    url: \"http://api:3232/api/v1/stats?format=prometheus\"\n    valueLocation: \"go_memstats_mcache_inuse_bytes\"",
+        "triggers:\n    - type: metrics-api\n      metadata:\n        url: http://keda-metric-app-svc.default.svc.cluster.local/prom-metric\n        targetValue: \"30\"  # Threshold for scaling\n        format: prometheus # picked this value from the PR (enum)\n        promMetricLocation: \"metric\" # name of the metrics e.g. rpc_duration_seconds{quantile=\"0.99\"} including the dimension\n        promMetricType: \"summary\" # possible values counter, summary, histogram, gauge. I am thinking this will probably help in parsing the value, may keep as optional",
+        "triggers:\n    - type: metrics-api\n      metadata:\n        url: http://keda-metric-app-svc.default.svc.cluster.local/prom-metric\n        targetValue: \"30\"  # Threshold for scaling\n        format: prometheus # picked this value from the PR (enum)\n        valueLocation: \"rpc_duration_seconds{quantile=\"0.99\"}\" # name of the metrics"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "keda",
+      "graduated",
+      "app-definition",
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "keda"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [],
+    "difficulty": "intermediate",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "graduated",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/kedacore/keda/issues/2633",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/kedacore/keda",
+      "pr": "https://github.com/kedacore/keda/pull/5347"
+    },
+    "reactions": 9,
+    "comments": 37,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",
+    "tools": [
+      "kubectl"
+    ],
+    "description": "A running Kubernetes cluster with keda installed or the issue environment reproducible."
+  },
+  "security": {
+    "scannedAt": "2026-03-17T06:27:02.558Z",
+    "scannerVersion": "cncf-gen-3.0.0",
+    "sanitized": true,
+    "findings": []
+  }
+}
